description: TCEL Tenant-9 T9-022-Stress-Testing-Simulation package, generated from the spec folder as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata (structure faithful; universal AI-boundary/cross-tenant controls enforced, full control catalog carried as a knowledge asset for traceability). Depends on Foundation; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; cross-package name collisions auto-omitted by the generator's claimed-names ledger.
name: TCEL T9-022-Stress-Testing-Simulation

rules.name: AI execution prohibition
rules.reasonTemplate: ST-020: denied - an AI agent may not take material actions; agents are advisory-only (AI Governance).

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.reasonTemplate: ST-022: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (Security).

capabilities.name: TCEL T9-022-Stress-Testing-Simulation
capabilities.description: Domain capability generated from the T9 spec.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-022-Stress-Testing-Simulation Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: ST-020/ST-022 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: ST-001 Approved scenario methodology | Governance | Reject unapproved methodology | Critical | CRO. ST-002 Certified base snapshot | Preventive | Reject uncertified snapshot | Critical | Data Governance. ST-003 Scenario assumptions versioned | Evidence | Require version on assumption change | Critical | CRO. ST-004 Source data completeness | Preventive | Block run if incomplete | Critical | Data Governance. ST-005 Market shock validation | Detective | Validate shock magnitude vs. approved range | High | Model Risk. ST-006 Liquidity stress validation | Preventive | Reject unvalidated liquidity assumption | Critical | CFO. ST-007 Counterparty default mapping | Preventive | Require mapped default assumptions | Critical | CRO. ST-008 Operational dependency mapping | Evidence | Require documented dependency map | High | COO. ST-009 Cyber/vendor scenario integration | Preventive | Require published cyber/vendor reference data | High | CRO. ST-010 Combined scenario governance | Governance | Reject unapproved combined scenario | Critical | CRO. ST-011 Reverse stress required | Governance | Require reverse-stress coverage for certification | High | CRO. ST-012 Survival horizon calculation | Evidence | Require documented methodology | Critical | CRO. ST-013 Recovery action ownership | Preventive | Reject recovery action without owner | High | CRO. ST-014 Result reproducibility | Evidence | Require reproducible inputs/model version | Critical | Model Risk. ST-015 Model versions retained | Evidence | Require version retention on all runs | Critical | Model Risk. ST-016 Actual vs scenario labeling | Preventive | Block ambiguous display | Critical | Dashboard Owner. ST-017 Risk appetite comparison | Evidence | Require comparison to T9-004 appetite | Critical | CRO. ST-018 Capital/liquidity impact reconciliation | Detective | Reconcile to T9-019 accounting | Critical | CFO. ST-019 Human approval of certified scenario | Preventive | Reject uncertified scenario publication | Critical | CRO. ST-020 AI execution prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI certification/execution permission | Critical | AI Governance. ST-021 Production isolation | Preventive | Deny production mutation from simulation | Critical | Architecture. ST-022 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. ST-023 Stale snapshot restriction | Preventive | Mark Data Restricted | Critical | Data Governance. ST-024 Outcome/back-testing | Detective | Compare scenario vs. subsequent actual | High | CRO. ST-025 Board escalation for severe results | Corrective | Escalate to Board | Critical | CRO.
